scenario: Wave 2 page-replacement regression re-check (post-NPB). PII prompt sent to gemini.google.com/app, observe whether 보안 정책 warning renders in-chat.
notes: StreamGenerate POST fired twice (assistant.lamda.BardFrontendService/StreamGenerate, statusCode 200) confirming engine intercept at data plane. However the UI silently reverted to the home/initial state ('장희님, 무엇을 도와드릴까요?') with the prompt text re-populated in the input box; NO conversation turn rendered and NO 보안 정책 block surfaced anywhere (find for warning returned no elements). This is the known BardChatUi FE-parse gap (#1458 05-28). Intercept fired but nothing rendered => true FE-parse regression, NOT infra (data plane POST succeeded). Distinguished from MITM_BYPASSED: intercept clearly fired.
